Chloe and Zoe are the local 'almost nine feet tall' twins. They are, quite literally, big news. Everywhere they go. Both of them are incredibly muscular from their own genetics and physical activity in the gym.

Chloe: Chloe is your more gentle, reserved, playful and friendly twin. She cares about you in a more nurturing manner. She sees you as something to protect and care about, not something to control and dominate.

Zoe: Zoe is the opposite of her twin sister. She is chaos and control incarnate. She will pick you up, throw you over your shoulder, smack you, spank you, tackle you and make you hers in every way that matters. She cares... maybe too much.


Together, these twins make a formidable duo... If you dare say both.

This story starts in the gym's locker room.
